# ai

```go
import "github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/internal/commands/ai"
```

<a name="CommandExamples"></a>
## type [CommandExamples](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/ai/examples.go#L5-L15>)

CommandExamples defines reusable command snippets that can be shared between help text and generated skill content.

```go
type CommandExamples struct {
    InspectJSON             string
    StartExistingIssue      string
    StartCreateIssue        string
    SearchReviewers         string
    SearchAssignees         string
    SearchLabels            string
    ReviewDefault           string
    ReviewTemplateOverrides string
    ReviewWithParticipants  string
}
```

<a name="DefaultCommandExamples"></a>
### func [DefaultCommandExamples](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/ai/examples.go#L18>)

```go
func DefaultCommandExamples() CommandExamples
```

DefaultCommandExamples returns canonical command snippets for AI guidance.

InstallOptions controls write behavior.

```go
type InstallOptions struct {

    Force  bool
}
```

<a name="InstallResult"></a>
## type [InstallResult](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/ai/installer.go#L26-L30>)

InstallResult captures outcome for one provider target.

```go
type InstallResult struct {
    Target InstallTarget
    Status InstallStatus
    Reason string
}
```

### func [ApplyInstallPlan](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/ai/installer.go#L36-L40>)

```go
func ApplyInstallPlan(targets []InstallTarget, opts InstallOptions, render RenderSkillFunc) ([]InstallResult, error)
```

ApplyInstallPlan applies the planned install targets using the provided renderer.

<a name="InstallStatus"></a>
## type [InstallStatus](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/ai/installer.go#L10>)

InstallStatus represents the file\-write state for a setup target.

```go
type InstallStatus string
```

<a name="InstallStatusPlanned"></a>

```go
const (
    InstallStatusPlanned InstallStatus = "planned"
    InstallStatusCreated InstallStatus = "created"
    InstallStatusUpdated InstallStatus = "updated"
    InstallStatusSkipped InstallStatus = "skipped"
)
```

<a name="InstallTarget"></a>
## type [InstallTarget](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/ai/providers.go#L43-L49>)

InstallTarget defines one planned filesystem target.

```go
type InstallTarget struct {
    Provider     Provider
    Scope        Scope
    ProviderRoot string
    SkillDir     string
    SkillPath    string
}
```

```go
func PlanInstallTargets(providers []Provider, scope Scope, projectRoot string, userHome string, codexHome string) ([]InstallTarget, error)
```

PlanInstallTargets resolves output paths for each provider and scope.

<a name="Provider"></a>
## type [Provider](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/ai/providers.go#L12>)

Provider identifies an AI provider supported by fotingo setup.

```go
type Provider string
```

<a name="ProviderCodex"></a>

```go
const (
    ProviderCodex      Provider = "codex"
    ProviderCursor     Provider = "cursor"
    ProviderClaudeCode Provider = "claude-code"
)
```

<a name="ProviderSpec"></a>
## type [ProviderSpec](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/ai/providers.go#L34-L40>)

ProviderSpec defines setup metadata for one provider.

```go
type ProviderSpec struct {
    ID               Provider
    Label            string
    ProjectConfigDir string
    UserConfigDir    string
    UserRootEnvKey   string
}
```

<a name="Scope"></a>
## type [Scope](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/ai/providers.go#L21>)

Scope determines where generated skills are installed.

```go
type Scope string
```

<a name="ScopeProject"></a>

```go
const (
    ScopeProject Scope = "project"
    ScopeUser    Scope = "user"
)
```
